symbols.vision_description: A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face. Flanked by angular bracket-like marks (greater-than and less-than shapes) on either side.

A black circular outline containing three filled black dots arranged in a triangular face pattern: two dots on top resembling eyes and one dot below resembling a mouth. The circle is flanked by partial Latin letterforms ('r' on the left, 'x' on the right) that appear to be part of surrounding text.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one dot centered below), resembling a simple face.
A circular outline containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern resembling a simple face with two eyes and a mouth/nose
A circular outline containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple emoticon face.
